zh.lifeSummary: John de Insula是Lord Baldwin De Insula的兒子，於1250年出生在英國英格蘭哈普爾伍頓。他至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1305年在英國英格蘭哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特伍頓享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: John de Insula是Lord Baldwin De Insula的儿子，于1250年出生在英国英格兰哈普爾伍頓。他至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1305年在英国英格兰哈普爾易斯爾 本 懷特伍頓享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Insula
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician: habitational name from any of the places called Insua, meaning ‘island, peninsula (of a river or of the sea), land by a river’, from Latin insula ‘island’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: John de Insula was born in 1250, in Wootton, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom as the son of Lord Baldwin De Insula. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1305, in Wootton, Isle of Wight, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

ja.Wootton, Hampshire, England: イギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアウットオン
ja.Wootton, , Isle of Wight, England: イギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアイスル オフ ウィトウットオン
ja.lifeSummary: John de Insulaは1250年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアウットオンでLord Baldwin De Insulaの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1305年にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアイスル オフ ウィトウットオンで55歳で死去した。

ko.Wootton, , Isle of Wight, England: 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트 보턴
ko.lifeSummary: John de Insula(은)는 1250년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 보턴에서 Lord Baldwin De Insula의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1305년 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 이슬일 프 와이트 보턴에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: John de Insula родился в 1250 г. в местности вуттон, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Lord Baldwin De Insula. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1305 г. в местности вуттон, исл оф ваит, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.
